description: Phase 1 ingestion check: source availability and row-level parsing success for each staging extractor. Distinct from validation_report.json, which gates normalized-table release readiness.

sources.notes: Covers every entry in PokéAPI's /pokemon list: base species plus Mega/regional/alternate forms, so Champions/tournament form-level rows have a canonical row to join against (Phase 2 normalization).

sources.availability: reachable, HTTP 200, embedded pokemon payload located and parsed
sources.notes: pokemon_id is null for 105/317 rows (fabricated OP.GG ids >=10000 for Mega/regional/alternate forms); expected per schema contract (pokemon_id required: false). regulation_code blank for all rows; expected, not published on this page (required: false).

sources.availability: reachable, HTTP 200 for tournaments_index.json and all per-tournament metadata.json/players.json fetches
sources.notes: 31 tournaments, 17685 teams, 8844 distinct players. form_name blank for all rows; expected, not separately reported by this source (required: false).

sources.availability: reachable, HTTP 200, embedded pokemon payload located and parsed
sources.notes: One row per (pokemon, regulation) pair for the 310 pokemon entries (of 1360 total in PokéBase's database) currently in the Champions legal pool; 272 rows under regulation m-a, 39 under m-b.
